/Library/Developer/CommandLineTools/usr/bin/c++ -O3 -DNDEBUG -arch arm64 -isysroot /Library/Developer/CommandLineTools/SDKs/MacOSX26.2.sdk -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/nanoPython.dir/nanoPython_autogen/mocs_compilation.cpp.o CMakeFiles/nanoPython.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/nanoPython.dir/src/main_window.cpp.o CMakeFiles/nanoPython.dir/src/editor/code_editor.cpp.o CMakeFiles/nanoPython.dir/src/editor/syntax_highlighter.cpp.o CMakeFiles/nanoPython.dir/src/editor/code_folding.cpp.o CMakeFiles/nanoPython.dir/src/editor/tab_widget.cpp.o CMakeFiles/nanoPython.dir/src/interpreter/mp_wrapper.cpp.o CMakeFiles/nanoPython.dir/src/interpreter/run_task.cpp.o CMakeFiles/nanoPython.dir/src/ui/toolbar.cpp.o CMakeFiles/nanoPython.dir/src/ui/output_panel.cpp.o CMakeFiles/nanoPython.dir/src/ui/project_panel.cpp.o CMakeFiles/nanoPython.dir/src/ui/repl_panel.cpp.o CMakeFiles/nanoPython.dir/src/ui/splash_dialog.cpp.o CMakeFiles/nanoPython.dir/src/utils/file_utils.cpp.o CMakeFiles/nanoPython.dir/nanoPython_autogen/3YJK5W5UP7/qrc_nanoPython.cpp.o -o nanoPython -F/opt/homebrew/lib  -Wl,-rpath,/opt/homebrew/lib /opt/homebrew/lib/QtWidgets.framework/Versions/A/QtWidgets /opt/homebrew/lib/QtGui.framework/Versions/A/QtGui /opt/homebrew/lib/QtConcurrent.framework/Versions/A/QtConcurrent -framework AppKit -framework OpenGL -framework ImageIO -framework Metal /opt/homebrew/lib/QtCore.framework/Versions/A/QtCore -framework IOKit -framework DiskArbitration -framework UniformTypeIdentifiers
